storyInfo: Momoka unknowingly picked up a broken blade while filming her TV show, which leads Mifune to order her capture. Mio pleads for Mifune to abandon his plan, but Mifune's men pursue her all the way to the shrine. With the aid of the Unruffled Priest, Hoshiguma and Momoka manage to escape.

attributes.content: Mifune-san!
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: How are you doing with that task I gave you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Our Diet Member has finally approved the separation of the Kinseki Group from the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: As long as you now accept the role of chairman, the Kinseki Group and the Kinsekikai can go their separate ways.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Then why don't we hold the succession ceremony during tomorrow's fireworks festival? What do you think?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tessai's views have not changed. Now, he even has Hoshiguma on his side, is one day really enough time for us to...?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I saw your brow twitch. I know what you're thinking. You know I don't joke about things like this, yet you still don't believe me. Basically, you think that...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I shouldn't have forced you to forge a letter in the Old Man's name, and that calling Hoshiguma back here did nothing but cause trouble for everyone... is that it?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Twenty years ago... Hoshiguma... and that shield of hers... spilled quite a bit of blood. After all, it was the last thing the Old Man forged... Mio, have you ever been to his home?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yes, many years ago.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What is his house full of?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Televisions.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: That's right, televisions.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The Old Man might be stubborn, but his instincts are still sharp, some of the time.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He knew that if the Kinsekikai continued their unending torrent of bloodshed, we were bound to be destroyed sooner or later. So he set his sights on Originium crystalline components.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He quickly converted his metalworking shop into a workshop for crystalline components, and it was an instant success. After that, the Old Man no longer had time to forge the legendary weapons he loved most.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Just as his crystal business was really taking off, the Old Man suddenly acquired the materials, and techniques, to forge shields from a fallen noble house of the Mitsumoto faction.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: They say that he spent nearly half of the Group's liquid assets to acquire them.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That shield, the last shield the old man ever forged, the shield he had spent so many assets to acquire... do you ever think it might have had some special significance to the Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The transition to a new leader.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Even you knew that... but the Old Man just let the matter sit there. He kept putting it off and putting it off, all the way until the Southern Court was about to hold the first meeting of its Diet.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You young ones grew up with the Diet, but back in my day, no one even knew what it was.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: We thought the Diet was going to revamp the bureaucracy as soon as they took office, but it took them a few years to get around to it.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Back then, all we'd heard was that the members of the Diet were to be chosen from among the commoners. The entire Southern Court was in an uproar, and then that poor fool, Koretou, emerged.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The candidate?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes. He had a whole heap of political views, but his core aim was to drive us, the Kinsekikai, out of Kajimachi.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He roused a bunch of useless rabble and had them shouting and yelling outside Kajimachi all day and night. It made it impossible for us to do business.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The Old Man, no... not just him, the whole Kinsekikai didn't take Koretou seriously at first, but every day, he recruited more and more troublemakers.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: So... you decided to get rid of him.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes, and you know the rest of the story, of course. After Koretou died, the Kinsekikai learned what real public fury looks like.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That was also when I learned that to the Four Great Clans, the members of the Diet are nothing but stage props...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But to us... they're people who can decide our fate with a single word.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: With all due respect, you could just come out and say it: if Chairman Tessai refuses to yield, you'll need Hannya at the succession ceremony.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I say, sometimes you really do sound just like him.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Of course, Tessai lording it over me is one thing. Hearing it from someone as steadfast and frank as you is another thing entirely.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: In truth, once the Kinseki Group splits from the Kinsekikai, I obviously can't stay on as chairman. Is there anyone else, besides you, who can take my place?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The day I step into politics and build a power base of my own, you and your Kinsekikai won't be forgotten.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune bursts out laughing to himself.
The woman before him remains expressionless. Is it habitual impassivity, incredulity, or mere indifference to Mifune's grand vision? There's no way to tell.
For now, Momoka is still our top priority.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She knows too much, and she's in cahoots with that information broker.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She even leapt out a window just to keep Sanoguchi's broken blade on her. Don't you understand what that means?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune-san——
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You were too kind-hearted to kill her, and you were willing to admit that to me. That's good. I can promise you this much: we can reconsider our plan to infect her with Oripathy.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: First, however, you must bring her to me.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That broken blade she's carrying.... we must recover its guard, no matter the cost.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Secondly, there's no way she can continue her career as an entertainer. From now on, she'll have to remain firmly under our control.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Are you okay with that?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You are most magnanimous.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: No. When you bring her here, she should be the one thanking you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The sun slowly climbs overhead.
Although no other visitors are present, the garden no longer seems so empty and quiet, with four humans and a kami walking through it.

Kichisei begins thrusting forward anything and everything she has that a woman could conceivably scrawl a signature on. Startled by the sudden barrage, Momoka keeps her autographing hand moving without pause.
On the other side of the courtyard, the kannushi cradles the kami, who only moments ago was darting about. The kami speaks to Hoshiguma.
You must understand, the kami was the one who wanted to play games with you. As a kannushi, I could only stand and watch—I couldn't interfere. Please forgive me, Hoshiguma-san.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Well, you sure were happy to watch, weren't you?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Was I?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: I think so.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Wholeheartedly serving the kami is bound to lift one's mood. I imagine you felt it too just now, Hoshiguma-san—and you, Momoka-san.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: I'm more interested in why It broke into my house in middle of the night.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What do you mean? You talk like I'm some kind of dangerous fiend. Wouldn't you think it was strange if someone was cleaning out junk from a cursed house, and then went to sleep in said haunted house?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Just because it's a haunted house? There are so many killings in Mitsukue, and Kajimachi is hardly a peaceful place. So why did you have to go snooping around my home in particular?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Because of the kaidan stories.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Are you or are you not involved with those kaidan stories? Tell me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: 'Simply appearing at the same time that a few strange events occur' and 'being the one who spawned the haunted house and the kaidan stories' are two very different things, alright?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: If I could spawn kaidan stories all by myself, what would I be doing riding a unicycle all over the place?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: So basically, you were just tagging along for fun, but people mistook you for the kaidan from the legend?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Not bad. You're pretty sharp.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I'm telling you, being a kami is a job that depends entirely on the whims of fate.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: This Kizuna Jinja is about bringing people together. Most of you spend your whole lives dealing with other people, and there's probably nothing more important than the bonds you form, don't you think?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: When times are stable, people pray for their existing bonds to last. When times are turbulent, they pray for these bonds to carry them through—or for new ones to form.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: But over the past decade or so, fewer and fewer people have come here. These days, on our best days, we only get a dozen or so visitors.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Is this true, Kannushi-sama?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's exaggerating a bit, but we indeed have been getting far fewer visitors the past few years.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Some kami are lazy. The fewer visitors they get, the happier they are. I'm not like that. If it's always this slow, I'm going to die of boredom, you know?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Speaking of lazy.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There's a lazy one right at your feet.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Hoshiguma looks down at her feet, but there is nothing there, only the stone floor of the shrine.
Hey, show yourself, you're the shrine's star, no?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Hoshiguma reaches down to feel around her feet.
The priest can see that Hogishuma's hand is touching the center of the kami's body, yet Hoshiguma doesn't even realize that she's touched anything at all.
Here's the reason our shrine is known for forging bonds. Whenever he feels someone has been having good luck in love or relationships, it'll show itself.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: But if it thinks you haven't had much luck with relationships lately, or that you're about to have a run of terrible luck, it'll flat-out refuse to show itself.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I've said all of that, and yet it still doesn't want to appear before you. It sounds like you're in for some bad luck.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Your actions will determine your future. You don't have to take Its words at face value, Hoshiguma-san.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Why are you speaking against your own kami?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Basically, when people get bored, they tend to pursue random aims. Kami are no different.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Right after you disappeared, the kaidan tales started to spread through Mitsukue. There's nothing wrong with chasing a few kaidan to pass the time, is there?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Why the silent treatment? Do you fear your imminent misfortune?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Not really. I just didn't expect that a kami would chase after something so fleeting and unreal.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why you little!
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Regardless, you are not the kami Moriuchi is looking for.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Of course not.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: But, might I trouble you to come travel with us? Talk is cheap. If you could just chat with him the way you're chatting with me and Momoka for a bit...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kannushi-sama, help! This Oni wants to steal away your beloved kami!
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: These past few years, Moriuchi has given me many gifts, including a never-ending supply of oden.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Hmph.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Forget it. I'm a softy, after all. I'll go with you.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Hoshiguma, have you finished your chat with the priest?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: We're almost finished. Where is Kichisei?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: She left already. She had to go back and mind the store.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Is this girl coming with us?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Yes, Momoka is coming too. She knows all the kaidan stories. That should be enough to convince you to tag along, yeah?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I already told you I was going. I didn't need more convincing, so why does it matter that she's coming with?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Despite its words, the kami still pedals its unicycle over to Momoka, sniffing to the left and peeking over to the right, looking thoroughly intrigued.
Little girl, I've seen so many of your TV shows. Have you been afflicted with some kind of curse?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: H-How should I know?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm actually afraid of kaidan. I just want a quiet life, without all the weird stuff.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You're not the least bit curious about them?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I just want to advance my entertainment career.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The kaidan stuff helped me broaden my audience, but I don't really feel... that's the best way to do it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Entertainers should rely on their own talent to bring people joy. That's how it should be done.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There aren't too many people who still think like you do. Interesting.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: By the way, I wanted to ask you something! Last night, some really scary stuff happened in my house!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Out of nowhere, my TV started controlling itself; it showed clips of me singing, cut together with those blaring emergency alerts.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Then at the end, I have no idea why, but it played a really... scary video.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Tsk tsk tsk! What was the video about? Some cryptid? A bloody murder scene?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: None of those things. It was... a video of Mio-san. And soon after the video ended, she actually did show up at my place...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Wasn't that just your TV on the fritz? That's not the kind of kaidan I'm looking for.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: It's not?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You've been studying these kaidan. Don't you think they're actually just humans messing around?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You really don't get it, do you? If the ghost stories were all just human mischief, would I even be investigating them in the first place?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Each of these kaidan defy any conceivable explanation.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: When people can't figure out the cause of something, guys like Moriuchi just go and pin the blame on us kami.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: And if even a kami can't figure out what's going on, well, that just means there's someone or something stronger, more mysterious, and way more thrilling than me pulling the strings behind the scenes.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: But you're the one riding the unicycle.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ahem... That doesn't matter. Don't try to change the subject!
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: So you mean you're also chasing kami? You're chasing the 'kami above the kami'?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Exactly!
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Kichisei?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You swapped terminal numbers with Kichisei?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yes. The agency doesn't usually let me interact with my fans. And she's such a big one.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hello? Kichisei?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That's not true! I didn't mean it—that's not what I meant!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Right! I never once said I was running!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Yes. Uhuh.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You can't talk now...? You think you're being followed?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Okay. Well then I'll...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oh? The shrine too?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Right. I'll tell everyone right away. Be careful!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Someone spread word that you're running away?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kichisei said it was spreading all over the forums. It didn't seem like some random rumor, more like something Kinseki Channel deliberately leaked…
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What's up with Kichisei then?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A Kinsekikai guy was tailing her. She also said the area around the shrine might not be safe, she saw people sneaking around when she stepped out through the shrine gate.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The next time you see Kichisei, please thank her for me.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: You really don't need to be too worried. Whether or not the yakuza are running around Mitsukue, even if they dare invade the shrine, they're just causing themselves trouble.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: If you need to take shelter within the shrine grounds, you can head inside. I'll handle everything else. If you'd rather leave, I'll show you the way out. Take the side path.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: I think we'd better leave. The longer we stay here, the more men they can deploy around here to get us.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka, you're gonna have to ride the scooter.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Okay! I've been riding all night. I think I'm starting to get the hang of it!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Then we'll be going, Kannushi-sama.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: If I go with you, are those yakuza going to chase me too?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: We'll try our hardest not to attract any attention—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Then I'll be the one providing cover?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: By 'cover,' you mean—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're going to help us draw away the yakuza, right?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That's pretty much the idea. Playing those slow-witted yakuza fools every now and then, well, it's not as thrilling as chasing kaidan, but it does pass the time.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I'll make a break through the front gate first to distract the dumb yakuza goons. You all slip out the back and we'll rendezvous at that moron's yatai.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Before anyone even has the chance to respond, the unicycle shoots through the shrine gate like lightning, its pedals spinning so fast they're just a blur.
It seems like that kami really cares about you.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Haha...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But now's not the time for sentimentality. You two come over here. I'll show you the way.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: This path is pretty well-hidden...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Yes, but that's not to say that no one will find it. Get out of here as quickly as you can.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Thank you for your help and generosity.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Don't mention it—
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: There's something moving over this way! Come on! Bring your camera over here! I think there's someone here!
attributes.name: Reporter's Voice

attributes.content: This area is still part of the shrine grounds. Are you sure it's okay for us to barge in here?
attributes.name: Camera Operator's Voice

attributes.content: What matters more: Mifune-san's orders, or some dumb shrine rules? Get over here!
attributes.name: Reporter's Voice

attributes.content: You don't need to start throwing hands like a street thug! You just need a mic and a camera, and you're set. Can you think of an easier gig?! Get over here!
attributes.name: Reporter's Voice

attributes.content: Kannushi-sama, wh—what do we do now?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The kannushi says nothing. The easygoing look he's worn—with an occasional hint of self-satisfaction—is nowhere to be found.
You two, please wait here for a moment.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: You're going to go fight them?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Just the usual routine, clearing away a bit of lingering evil
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: The priest gives the gohei a casual flick. The wind chimes fall silent as the leaves quiver. The air suddenly turns thin and clear.

Gleaming fire gushes from the wide sleeves of his robe, like streams of spring water—neither surging nor even trembling—only drifting quietly through the air, until a gust of wind sweeps through from the shrine gate.
It is a cruel wind, sharp as a knife, the kind no kami would raise in idle sport with humankind.

Seeing the faint foxfire flare up in the rear courtyard, the kami at the shrine gate lets go of the handlebars and rises to its feet. With a trace of pride, it lifts a forepaw and sweeps it through the air—
The crystalline flames burst like exorcising thunder, and the shimenawa hung around the shrine instantly ignite with foxfire, severing the mortal world from the divine realm.
The fierce wind erupts along the edge of the divine realm, tearing away every camera, drone, and listening device, along with their camouflage, and hurling them into the air.
Woah! That's some wind! Why is all the equipment flying all over the place?!
attributes.name: Camera Operator's Voice

attributes.content: The gohei slices into the wind and shears apart the surging foxfire. The wind strips the casings off the surveillance equipment, while the flames shoot through each newly exposed core with perfect precision.
The surveillance equipment ignites with brilliant, silent white flames; a moment later, bursts apart and falls to the ground as bits of scorched charcoal.
Kannushi-sama...? Are you actually an Arts master?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Just a few little tricks, is all. Nothing spectacular.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Now's your chance. Get going!
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest
